reviews.author: Hye Huang
reviews.text: I came in the low season, so the beach is quite deserted, the water is clean, but the sand is not as beautiful as the places I have been to, the length of the sand is also quite small, in the crowded tourist season, you should probably consider visiting this place. Because there is a resort next to it, going to the toilet will also require a service fee of 20,000 VND.

reviews.author: Isis Godess
reviews.text: Walking the coastal path from Cat Co 1 to 2 and 3 provided amazing views... Highly recommended 🤩🏮🇻🇳

reviews.author: Jeanette Fox
reviews.text: A small, sandy beach in a bay. Free entry. If you would like an umbrella and lounger ask the hotel. Water is warm with few small waves perfect for children. Easy to walk in and get wet and swim, not very tidal nor strong currents. Lots of leaves in the water. Parking at the entrance to the beach. A lovely walk along some steps and concrete path if you would like to walk to the next beach.

reviews.author: prajwal kulkarni
reviews.text: Beautiful beach with great views. There’s a walkway that connects to the cat co 3 beach. Evening would be a good time to visit.

reviews.author: Alberto Jiménez
reviews.text: As some other commented, beach destroyed by the mankind's greedy. Full of concrete and mixture of coloured buildings... Beach full of plastic and small plastic particles.. expected something more.. stunning but got disappointed instead... Perhaps in used to other type of scenery more.. wild and better taken care. Local government should take care of the trash and upkeep it. If you park the bike there, fee is 10k VND.

reviews.author: Tweetu Piyudi
reviews.text: When we visited in mid-November, there was a small crowd. Entry is free and open to everyone, as the beach is not privatized. It is clean, with shallow water perfect for swimming. The sand here is softer and better than Cat Co 2, with no rocks at the bottom. While Cat Co 2 has slightly clearer water, it also has a rocky bottom. A nearby market within walking distance offers great food and shopping options. You can also use a public shuttle service to the main market for just 5,000 dongs PP. The big hotel in the back ruins the view. One can use loungers, shower or pay for food and drinks from these very hotels. I personally feel bathroom and shower can be used in these hotels. It is decently charged.

reviews.author: Frederik Brok Brandi
reviews.text: When we were there the water was quite dirty. Some plastic and other things in the water. A beach chair cost 100k dong for guests not staying in the hotel. But if you want, you can just lay on the beach for free, I think. If you want to use shower you have to pay. Still it is a nice beach I would say.

reviews.author: Hiking In London
reviews.text: Cat Co 1 Beach is a must-visit destination for those visiting Cát Bà Island. It offers a perfect combination of natural beauty and tourist amenities. Whether you're looking to relax on the beach, explore the crystal-clear waters, or enjoy a meal with sea views, this beach has something for everyone.

reviews.author: Jeanphilippe Lavallée
reviews.text: Saw a couple of locals park their motorbike in a parking lot so i did the same. I got harassed by a guard asking for money when it was never asked for the locals. I took my motorbike further away and literally got chased by the guard, he seemed to be shouting things i couldn’t understand. Although i understood he didn’t want me there, there was no signs such as « no parking » or whatever so it felt like he was just trying to take money from me. Anyways my friends and i were not welcome there so it kind of ruined the experience for us. The beach looks great, there’s a little bar where you can get drinks right next to the hotel, a few chairs to relax and the place is super relaxing too! If you ever want to go there, make sure you park far from it and walk over there. It’s only a 5-10min walk!

reviews.author: megumiho
reviews.text: In November it is perfect, good weather, not much people.

reviews.author: Rose R
reviews.text: Not the cleanest and they will try and charge you for parking 10k Also the resort owns half the area you just have a tiny area you can lay on sand chairs cost 200k

reviews.author: Dwight
reviews.text: Very nice relaxing beach. It was not busy in early October. We rented a set of 4 chairs for 200k Dong. The beers are 30k and they also have smoothies and small snacks.

reviews.author: Alessandro Balocco
reviews.text: I really liked this beach, even though we just passed by to get to the Rocky path that brings you to beach 3. The beach is relatively small but I really enjoyed the big resort facing the beach and how it was camouflaging with the background with all the plants on its balconies. It looks like a great place during the low season when we visited but I can imagine becoming very crowded very quickly during the high season. Next to it there is also a water park with a couple of water slides!

reviews.author: Елена Гуляева
reviews.text: The beach is nice, but when the tide is coming, there is literally no place left. The first picture is a year ago without the tide(you can see how huge the sand line is) and two others are with the tide I did this time

reviews.author: Nhung Bui
reviews.text: Beautiful view! You can visit the Cat Co 1 Beach, Cat Co 2 next to it and go to the end of the road to see the Cat Co 3 Beach. The 3rd one will be cleaner and less people. Must try destination!

reviews.author: Pratik Gadgil
reviews.text: A clean beach with great views About 3/4th mile from the city centre, the beach at one of the ends of the main road is the a cool spot to relax. It is right next to a resort and not too long, and isn't easily noticeable given that there are many cars and taxis parked right in front of the small entry gate. The views of the rock formations on both right and left are amazing, and there is a small trail which goes through the rocks at the extreme right of the beach. When I went here in the evening, there were hardly anyone, and I could feel in the fresh breeze and sound of the waters

reviews.author: Javier Ramirez
reviews.text: Nice beach, fairly clean and with services like showers, toilets and changing rooms (which you need to pay for). The sand is quite nice and the water is calm and good to swim in. There is a nice little walk on the rocks to/from the other beach nearby.

reviews.author: Eva Meglič
reviews.text: The area around the beach is not very clean and there’s lot of trash everywhere. I personally would never want to swim here. It is nice if you would like to go for a walk in the morning/evening. The big hotel does kind of ruin the view.

reviews.author: Alex Nguyên
reviews.text: Cat Co 1 Beach in Cat Ba is a stunning destination that attracts both domestic and international tourists. The crystal clear water and soft sandy beaches make it an ideal spot for swimming, sunbathing, and kayaking. Visitors can also take photos of the breathtaking scenery or simply relax and enjoy the stunning view from the beach. The beach is well-maintained and has several restaurants and cafes nearby that offer delicious seafood and refreshing drinks. Cat Co 1 Beach is a popular destination for tourists who want to escape the busy city life and immerse themselves in the beauty of nature.

reviews.author: Anastasia Ustyugova
reviews.text: Construction everywhere((( it’s difficult to find a quiet place on the island…

reviews.author: Filip Bledziewski
reviews.text: It's so overcrowded, loud and dirty... Lan ha/ha long bays are beautiful but don't waste your time for staying in Cat ba for more than a night. The picture I uploaded is from 6:30 am...

reviews.author: Barak
reviews.text: Just great place to sit and relax, as specially, if you don’t want to pay for chairs, there is a place to sit on, but if you don’t want to grab something to drink or a snack, there is nearby restaurant of the hotel, which you can buy some thing to eat

reviews.author: monia25cimka
reviews.text: This is free beach and really beautiful. We spent afternoon swimming, you can even rent some inflatables or locker, loungers from nearby flamingo resort.

reviews.author: Craig Lock
reviews.text: It's off season right now so the beach is empty and the water is cold, but warm enough to just relax on the beach without the huge crowds of the summer.

reviews.author: Bjorn Rispens
reviews.text: It's a nice beach with a beautiful view on Lan ha bay. Only problem is that the hotel plays really loud music so its not exactly the quietest beach

reviews.author: Hung Yurn
reviews.text: Personally I would say that this is the nicest beach in CatBa (out of the 3). Midweeks it’s not too crowded and the scenery is beautiful. For the sunset you can walk over the stones to Beach 3. There you can get a pretty nice view 👍🏻

reviews.author: Sam
reviews.text: Nice beach, really nice temperature water and some good fun. There is lots of space to sit and enjoy the beach. Some tables and umbrellas. No one came over to charge us. Not the best of quality, but do the trick. Gets busy in the afternoon, but nice in the morning.

reviews.author: Katerina Bergeron
reviews.text: Nice beach with a stunning path above the cliffs leading to another beach

reviews.author: Rubein PM
reviews.text: The beach is really nice, I just don’t like the hotel that was built there, it just take the natural effect,

reviews.author: Ron Hovestad
reviews.text: Cat ba beach 1 was our favourite of them all. We paid 200,000 for a couple of padded recliners for the day with a large umbrella. Showers and bathroom. Nice music not too loud and a bar. The beach sand is nice, and the water doesn’t drop off fast like #3 beach does. Clean water compared to #3 beach also.
